--- Round 1 ---
<think>I need to analyze DOC4 to determine which of the 6 case categories it belongs to. From the anchor summaries, I can see this is an execution objection case (执行异议案件) involving a financial loan contract dispute execution. Let me open the key anchors to get the actual document text and determine the exact case type.

The anchors suggest this is related to execution proceedings (执行), but I need to verify if it matches "执行案由-先予执行" (advance execution) or if it's a different type of execution case that doesn't fit any of the 6 categories.

Let me start by opening DOC4_A3 which contains the case background.</think>
<search>{"action":"open","anchor_id":"DOC4_A3","expected_evidence":"案件类型和案由信息"}</search>
<info anchor_id="DOC4_A3">
本院在执行华融创新投资有限责任公司（以下简称华融创新）与陕西龙天投资置业有限公司（以下简称龙天公司）、延安王家坪实业发展集团有限公司（以下简称王家坪公司）、陕西王氏产业投资集团有限公司（以下简称王氏公司）、王强、姜漪、王西林、杨红金融借款合同纠纷一案中，案外人陈久玲向本院提出书面异议，请求中止对陕西省西安市经济技术开发区凤城三路7号“龙福佳园”项目×户、×户、×户的预售房产（以下简称案涉房屋）执行，撤销（2020）京04执恢57号执行裁定书，并解除对案涉房屋的查封。本院受理后，依法组成合议庭进行了审查，现已审查终结。
</info>

--- Round 2 ---
<think>From DOC4_A3, I can see this is an execution objection case (执行异议案件) arising from a financial loan contract dispute (金融借款合同纠纷). The case involves an outsider (案外人) objecting to the execution of pre-sold properties.

This appears to be an execution-related case, but I need to determine if it fits "执行案由-先予执行" (advance execution) or if it's a different type of execution case.

Let me check more anchors to understand the full context and see if there's any mention of "先予执行" (advance execution) or other case type indicators.

Let me open DOC4_A9 which contains the court's reasoning and ruling result to see the final classification.</think>
<search>{"action":"open","anchor_id":"DOC4_A9","expected_evidence":"法院裁定结果和案件类型认定"}</search>
<info anchor_id="DOC4_A9">
本院认为，本案系在金钱债权执行中，案外人对登记在被执行人名下的不动产主张权利以排除执行。根据《执行异议和复议规定》第二十七条规定，申请执行人对执行标的依法享有对抗案外人的担保物权等优先受偿权，人民法院对案外人提出的排除执行异议不予支持，但法律、司法解释另有规定的除外。本案中，华融创新对案涉房屋享有抵押权，而案外人对该不动产所享有的民事权益不符合《执行异议和复议规定》第二十九条的情形，不能对抗申请执行人的担保物权。同时，因龙天公司向案外人销售的房屋与其在西安市住房和城乡建设局商品房网上备案系统公示的房号不一致，故本案不符合《执行异议和复议规定》第二十八条和第二十九条“在人民法院查封之前已签订合法有效的书面买卖合同”的规定。综上，案外人对案涉房屋不享有足以排除强制执行的民事权益，故对其异议请求，本院不予支持。依照《中华人民共和国民事诉讼法》第二百二十七条及《最高人民法院关于人民法院办理执行异议和复议案件若干问题的规定》第二十四条的规定，裁定如下：
驳回案外人陈久玲的异议请求。
</info>

--- Round 3 ---
<think>From the two anchors I've opened:

DOC4_A3 shows this is an execution objection case (执行异议案件) arising from a financial loan contract dispute (金融借款合同纠纷). The case involves an outsider (案外人陈久玲) objecting to the execution of pre-sold properties.

DOC4_A9 shows the court's reasoning and ruling - it's about execution objection (执行异议) where the court rejected the outsider's objection to exclude execution.

This is clearly an execution-related case (执行案件), but I need to determine if it fits "执行案由-先予执行" (advance execution). Looking at the content:
- This is about 执行异议 (execution objection), not 先予执行 (advance execution)
- 先予执行 refers to advance execution before final judgment, typically in urgent cases
- This case is about a post-judgment execution where an outsider is objecting to the execution

This appears to be a regular execution objection case, not an "advance execution" (先予执行) case. The case type is 执行异议 (execution objection), which doesn't match any of the 6 categories provided:
1. 执行案由 - 先予执行 (advance execution)
2. 适用特殊程序案件案由 (special procedure cases)
3. 行政行为 - 行政征收 (administrative expropriation)
4. 产品责任纠纷 (product liability dispute)
5. 行政行为 - 行政处罚 (administrative penalty)
6. 人格权纠纷 (personality rights dispute)

This execution objection case doesn't fit any of these 6 categories. It's a standard execution objection case (执行异议), not advance execution (先予执行).

Let me check one more anchor to confirm there's no mention of 先予执行 or any other category that might apply. I'll open DOC4_A1 to see the full case title and parties information.</think>

<info anchor_id="DOC4_A1">
案外人：陈久玲，女，1990年11月19日出生，汉族，住四川省彭州市。
委托诉讼代理人：李丹，陕西朱西江律师事务所律师。
申请执行人：华融创新投资有限责任公司，住所地北京市西城区北三环中路甲29号院3号楼1层101号内106室。
法定代表人：曲少臣，执行董事。
委托诉讼代理人：马骋，北京德恒律师事务所律师。
委托诉讼代理人：关亚辉，北京德恒律师事务所律师。
</info>
